note: Internal sanity check only, per agent invariant I4 -- this is NOT verification. /cdr:verify is the delegated, independent verification step.
root_causes_summary: 1. crabInsertOnce/crabDeleteOnce/Tree.Lookup's leaf-level move-right peek treated an empty NextLeaf sibling as always requiring move-right; fixed to never move into an empty sibling (insert.go, delete.go, lookup.go).

2. repairEmptyLeafAtParent's borrow-from-left/merge-into-left branches could orphan a concurrently-split-but-not-yet-propagated left-sibling successor node; fixed by detecting left.NextLeaf != leafID and retrying (delete.go).

3. Leaf-split and internal-split write order let Tree.Lookup's lock-free optimistic reads observe a pointer to a not-yet-written new node (EOF read errors); fixed by writing the new node before the node that publishes a pointer to it (insert.go).
test_helper_fix: assertStructuralInvariants' (insert_test.go) LowKey check relaxed from exact-equality-to-actual-subtree-min to never-exceeds-actual-subtree-min, matching InternalNode.LowKey's documented fixed-at-creation-only contract. Not a production code change.
test_scale_adjustment: TestConcurrentMixedWorkload's scale reduced (80k keys/200 goroutines -> 8k keys/50 goroutines) after the original scale was confirmed to reliably time out (20m, both with and without -race, reproduced running alone) due to a pre-existing retry-backoff throughput/contention sensitivity unrelated to correctness (validated separately: original scale passes cleanly under -race, both single-run and -count=3). Explicitly authorized by the coordinator mid-task. Documented in btree_test.go's own doc comment, architecture-discovery.md, and validation-matrix.json.
self_consistency_caveats: This agent does not verify its own work (invariant I4). All claims above are internal sanity/build-green checks only.

The 80k-key/200-goroutine TestConcurrentMixedWorkload timeout's own root cause (retry-backoff throughput scaling under extreme contention) was NOT further root-caused or fixed -- only observed, reasoned about, and worked around by scale reduction, per explicit coordinator authorization. This is flagged for /cdr:verify and any future task to reconsider if very-large-scale stress coverage is later required.
